description_long: This is a medium-to-large, muscular dog with a short, dense black coat and a few lighter grayish patches on its head, neck, and back. The dog has a broad head, a strong neck, and a straight back, with a tail that is thick at the base and tapers to a point, held straight and level with the body. Its ears are floppy and hang close to the sides of the head, and the muzzle is broad with a slightly open mouth, showing a relaxed demeanor. The legs are sturdy and well-proportioned, with visible musculature and a stance that suggests alertness and readiness to move. The overall body shape and features are characteristic of a Labrador Retriever, particularly the black color variant. No collar or leash is visible, and the dog appears healthy and well-groomed, suitable for urban environments such as parks or sidewalks.
description: A muscular black dog with floppy ears, a straight tail, and a few lighter patches on its head and back, resembling a Labrador Retriever. The dog stands alert and healthy, with a short, dense coat.
description_view_0: Side view showing the dog's strong build, straight tail, and relaxed mouth, with lighter patches visible on the head and back.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the broad head, floppy ears, and symmetrical lighter markings on the face and chest.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the dog's muscular legs and the lighter patch on the neck and back.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the straight tail, muscular hind legs, and lighter markings running down the back and tail base.
attribute_tail_position: straight and level with the body
